code: import axios from"axios";const API=axios.create({baseURL:"http://localhost:5000/api"});API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});export const getPayrolls=function(){let search=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:"";let page=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:1;return API.get("/payroll",{params:{search,page}});};export const generatePayroll=employeeId=>API.post("/payroll/generate/".concat(employeeId));export const getPayrollById=id=>API.get("/payroll/".concat(id));
